name: core.openwop.connections.jira
description: Jira connection pack (RFC 0095) — Atlassian OAuth2 (3LO) provider for Jira Cloud. ADR 0033 DEPLOY-GATED. Reach is `mcp` against Atlassian's official first-party remote MCP server (the Rovo MCP server, https://mcp.atlassian.com/v1/mcp), which fronts Jira (and Confluence) under the signed-in user's permissions. Carries NO secret; the operator supplies the OAuth client id/secret host-side (ADR 0024 §7).
